business.name: Top Notch Tree Service
business.tagline: Clean cuts, clean cleanup, clean price

hero.headline: Tree work done *right the first time*
hero.subheadline: Storm damage, overgrowth, or removals — John and his crew handle it all and leave your yard cleaner than they found it.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every cut counts
services_section.subheading: Professional tree services with the cleanup you expect

services.title: Tree Removal
services.description: Complete removal including stump grinding. We handle the big ones and the tricky ones.

services.title: Tree Trimming & Pruning
services.description: Strategic cuts to keep your trees healthy and your property safe. No guesswork.

services.title: Storm Damage Cleanup
services.description: When nature makes a mess, we restore order. Emergency response for blocked driveways and damaged trees.

services.title: Lot Clearing
services.description: Full property clearing for new construction or landscape renovation projects.

about.heading: John & crew — Huntsville tree experts
about.body: We're the tree service team that shows up when we say we will, does exactly what we quoted, and leaves your property spotless.

reviews.name: Candace C.
reviews.text: John did excellent work trimming trees at my home. His team left zero debris behind — they raked the yard and blew off the patio areas! Very reasonable price for the amount of work.

reviews.name: Teddie B.
reviews.text: We recommend Top Notch with the highest rating! John and his crew do excellent work quickly, clean up perfectly, and charge a fantastic price. Helped us after storm damage blocked our driveway.

reviews.name: Sheila T.
reviews.text: BEST tree service EVER! Best price and service! Had two large backyard trees removed with expertise and outstanding professionalism. John and his crew are awesome!

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Huntsville & surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Professional tree service throughout Madison County

cta.heading: Ready to get started?
cta.body: Free estimates, honest pricing, and cleanup that'll impress your neighbors. Let's talk about your trees.
